storage.value:
Authentication RFC

This document describes the authentication architecture for our platform.

Overview

We will use OAuth2 with JWT tokens for authentication.

Requirements

  • Support Google and GitHub SSO
  • Token expiration: 1 hour for access tokens, 30 days for refresh tokens
  • Rate limiting: 100 requests per minute per user

Technical Design

The auth service will be a standalone microservice with the following endpoints:

EndpointMethodDescription
/auth/loginPOSTLogin with email/password
/auth/registerPOSTRegister new user
/auth/refreshPOSTRefresh access token
